3311780.name: Leading Picker
3311780.description:
Announcement

Due to my personal circumstances, I regret to inform you that the release date has been postponed. Additionally, please note that the release may be canceled. Thank you for your understanding.

Leading Picker is a first-person simulation game based on picking in warehouses. The goal is to complete your task faster than your computer-controlled rivals by developing strategy.

Overview

Picking refers to the task of collecting products specified on a list from various locations in a warehouse. It is randomly determined which and how many of the products you will be directed to pick.
The rivals with the same list as you will start the task at the same time. If you finish it before them, you are the winner.

Competition with Rivals

The rivals do their tasks quickly obeying certain rules. To win, you are required to see the list and the map, anticipate the movements of the rivals and consider how to proceed with the task. Even if you lose to your rivals, you can try again with the same list as many times as you like until you win, enjoying trial and error.
As you win more, you will unlock additional types of containers to use during your tasks.

Others

  • The controls are simple.

  • We have a detailed tutorial.
